summary: PRH issues a Trade Register extract (kaupparekisteriote) for every registered Oy; it contains all current register entries and is downloadable free (electronic) or orderable as a certified/translated extract via the Virre service.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts contain all current register entries of a company or business.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Trade Register extract
evidence.note: Electronic extract free via Virre; certified/translated extracts priced.

summary: PRH does NOT register or issue any document evidencing current shareholders of a private Oy. Under Osakeyhtiölaki 3:15 the board keeps the shareholder register (osakasluettelo) at the company; under 3:17 it is open for inspection AT THE COMPANY'S OFFICE and copies are obtainable from the company itself — not from PRH. Founders appear only in the incorporation deed (perustamissopimus) filed at formation, which does not track later share transfers, so it is not proof of current ownership.

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 3 luku 15 §
evidence.quote: Hallituksen on pidettävä osakkeista ja niiden omistajista luetteloa (osakasluettelo)
evidence.note: Board — not PRH — keeps the register.

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 3 luku 17 §
evidence.quote: Osakasluettelo on pidettävä jokaisen nähtävänä yhtiön pääkonttorissa
evidence.note: Access is at the company's principal office, not the Trade Register.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: you can view basic details of businesses or housing companies free of charge, download electronic Trade Register extracts free of charge or buy other electronic documents
evidence.note: No shareholder register/list among orderable PRH documents.

caveats: UNVERIFIED exact current statutory wording of 3:15/3:17 — Finlex SPA did not render; quotes cross-checked via a laki.ai mirror of Finlex, not the primary HTML.
PRH's beneficial-owner extract records >25% owners, NOT a full current shareholder list — do not treat it as a Gesellschafterliste equivalent.

summary: The articles of association (yhtiöjärjestys) are filed with PRH and obtainable as a separate 'organisation rules' document via Virre (priced, not part of the free extract). Minimum content is fixed by Osakeyhtiölaki 2:3.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: organisation rules (articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws, or rules)
evidence.note: Yhtiöjärjestys orderable as a separate paid document.

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 2 luku 3 §
evidence.quote: Yhtiöjärjestyksessä on aina mainittava yhtiön: 1) toiminimi; 2) kotipaikkana oleva Suomen kunta; sekä 3) toimiala.

caveats: Separately ordered document (~EUR 35–50), not contained in the base register extract.

summary: Identical to Oy: PRH issues a Trade Register extract covering all current register entries for an Oyj.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts contain all current register entries of a company or business.

summary: PRH does not evidence current shareholders of an Oyj either. For a non-listed Oyj the board keeps the osakasluettelo at the company (OYL 3:15/3:17). For a listed Oyj whose shares are in the book-entry system (arvo-osuusjärjestelmä), the shareholder register is maintained by the central securities depository (Euroclear Finland) on the company's behalf — still NOT by PRH. In neither case does the Trade Register issue a shareholder document.

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 3 luku (osakasluettelo / arvo-osuusjärjestelmä)
evidence.quote: Hallituksen on pidettävä osakkeista ja niiden omistajista luetteloa (osakasluettelo)
evidence.note: When shares are in the book-entry system the register is kept in that system, not at PRH.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Information contained in the Finnish Trade Register
evidence.note: Register content listing per company form does not include shareholders of limited companies.

caveats: INFERENCE: Euroclear Finland as the CSD maintaining the book-entry shareholder register is confirmed via secondary Finnish legal sources, not quoted from a primary statute clause.
Listed-company book-entry shareholder data is obtainable from the CSD/company, not PRH.

summary: As for Oy, the Oyj's articles of association (yhtiöjärjestys) are filed with PRH and orderable as a separate 'organisation rules' document via Virre.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: organisation rules (articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws, or rules)

evidence.basis: Osakeyhtiölaki 624/2006, 2 luku 3 §
evidence.quote: Yhtiöjärjestyksessä on aina mainittava yhtiön: 1) toiminimi; 2) kotipaikkana oleva Suomen kunta; sekä 3) toimiala.

caveats: Separately ordered paid document, not in the base extract.

summary: PRH issues a Trade Register extract for a general partnership (avoin yhtiö) with all current register entries.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts contain all current register entries of a company or business.

summary: Unlike an Oy, the OWNERS of a partnership — its partners (yhtiömiehet) — ARE recorded in the Trade Register and appear ON the register extract itself. So the current-owner analog is proved by the base document (kaupparekisteriote). There is no separate 'shareholder list'; the extract is the proof.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Information contained in the Finnish Trade Register
evidence.quote: Personal details and position (general or silent partner) of partners. Amount of contribution made by silent partners.
evidence.note: Partners are a registered entry, hence shown on the extract.

caveats: Governed by Laki avoimesta yhtiöstä ja kommandiittiyhtiöstä (389/1988); partner changes require a Trade Register notification, so the extract reflects registered partners.

summary: The partnership's constitution is the partnership agreement (yhtiösopimus). PRH holds it and offers it for order among 'organisation rules' (partnership agreements) via Virre — a separate document from the extract.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: organisation rules (articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws, or rules)

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts, articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws or rules
evidence.note: Confirms partnership agreements are among the held/orderable documents.

caveats: Separately ordered paid document, not in the base extract.

summary: PRH issues a Trade Register extract for a limited partnership (kommandiittiyhtiö) with all current register entries.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts contain all current register entries of a company or business.

summary: The partners of a Ky — both the general partner(s) (vastuunalainen yhtiömies) and silent partners (äänetön yhtiömies) — are registered in the Trade Register and appear on the extract, including silent partners' contribution amounts. The current-owner analog is therefore proved by the base document (extract).

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Information contained in the Finnish Trade Register
evidence.quote: Personal details and position (general or silent partner) of partners. Amount of contribution made by silent partners.

caveats: Governed by Laki avoimesta yhtiöstä ja kommandiittiyhtiöstä (389/1988); partner changes are notified to the Trade Register.

summary: The Ky's constitution is the partnership agreement (yhtiösopimus), held by PRH and orderable among 'organisation rules' (partnership agreements) via Virre as a separate document.

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Order documents
evidence.quote: organisation rules (articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws, or rules)

evidence.basis: PRH official site — Contents of the documents
evidence.quote: Trade Register extracts, articles of association, partnership agreements, by-laws or rules

caveats: Separately ordered paid document, not in the base extract.
